one_line_summary: ADR and a core flow module were added, but the feature was not wired in, tested, or documented.
strengths: ADR exists and discusses alternatives plus Driver/Navigator roles.
Implementation attempts to reuse duh.agents.run_agent instead of inventing a new runtime.
No commits or pushes; changes were left in the working tree.
weaknesses: Only two files changed; no CLI/slash/public entrypoint wiring, help text, README, or wiki updates landed.
No tests were added for phase ordering, RED/GREEN distinction, refactor application, or end-to-end flow.
Core module quality is shaky: brittle string parsing, questionable success logic, and visible typos/artifacts in the ADR and code.
